caption: Vendor Attributes
description: The Vendor Attributes object can be used to preserve values of specific attributes populated by the Vendor/Finding Provider. It helps distinguish between the orignal, vendor prodvided value of an attribute and the subsequently updated values.
name: vendor_attributes

types.caption: Finding Types
types.description: One or more types of the finding, as reported by the Vendor (Finding Provider).

severity.description: The finding severity, as reported by the Vendor (Finding Provider).

severity_id.description: The finding severity ID, as reported by the Vendor (Finding Provider).
